core_mechanism: many-body particle dynamics driven by a long-range mean field derived from a Poisson-type elliptic field equation whose source is modified by a density-dependent (nonlinear) term, producing an enhanced effective interaction that amplifies clustering instability
brief_reason: The method simulates many interacting bodies whose force comes from a density-dependent modification to the Poisson equation, adding an extra long-range scalar force that enhances nonlinear clustering.
